title: "We Are Charlie Kirk" by Spalexma
about: "We Are Charlie Kirk" by Spalexma, also known as the "We Are Charlie Kirk, We Carry the Flame" AI Song or simply We Are Charlie Kirk Meme, refers to an AI-generated song honoring late right-wing political pundit and organizer Charlie Kirk, sung by a male AI voice. The song went viral on TikTok and Twitter / X in November 2025, when many users shared the song to criticize and make fun of it. During the timeframe, it gained use as a TikTok sound, largely adding to the anti-Charlie Kirk memes, like Kirkified Memes, that humorously aimed to tarnish Kirk's legacy after his September 2025 death.
origin:
On September 16th, 2025, AI music "artist" Spalexma released a song titled "We Are Charlie Kirk" on Spotify. [1] Two days later, the song's audio was uploaded to YouTube,[2] gaining over 57,900 views and 1,300 likes in two months. At the 45-second mark, the male AI voice notably belts, "We are Charlie Kirk! We carry the flame!"

The lyrics of "We Are Charlie Kirk" were added to Genius[3] by contributors after the song's September 2025 release. They read:
